name: Landbageriet - Naturbageriet
description: A small bakery that makes both traditional as well vegan baked goods. Vegan range varies and might include cinnamon rolls, banana muffin, marzipan cookies, snegle, croissants, and cake. Uses honey and dairy in some items. Formerly known as Naturbageriet.                                    Open Mon-Fri 06:30-18:00, Sat-Sun 07:00-16:00.

Bakery

 





Bakery


                                    A small bakery that makes both traditional as well vegan baked goods. Vegan range varies and might include cinnamon rolls, banana muffin, marzipan cookies, snegle, croissants, and cake. Uses honey and dairy in some items. Formerly known as Naturbageriet.                                    Open Mon-Fri 06:30-18:00, Sat-Sun 07:00-16:00.

21 Jun 2025


                    Good                    
 - Edit






                        
                        I grabbed a bit of everything, including chocolate croissant, banana bread, cinnamon roll, and cinnamon snail.

 I enjoyed the chocolate croissant and the cinnamon snail ( flattened roll) the best.  <  Trying my best to describe it because I forgot the Danish names>

  The banana bread i could only taste spices and surprisingly no banana. This was unfortunately not eaten.The cinnamon roll was just okay 🤷🏻‍♀️.

Vegan








 

















 



 



 



 



 



12 Jan 2025


                    Yay!                    
 - Edit






                        
                        Finally got around to trying this place! It was amazing! Tried the chocolate croissant & frøsnapper (my favourite! Tasted exactly like the original kind!) and my partner tried the chocolate croissant and the kanelsnegl (also tasted exactly like the regular kind! And it was very big!) and his favourite was the croissant. They had so many options, and we will definitely be back. Also a plus that they have gluten-free options for those who need that, although we didn’t try those yet;) #Veganuary

Pros: Large portions, Location very central, Tastes very similar to original pastries

10 Nov 2024


                    Lots of vegan baked goods                    
 - Edit






                        
                        This is a small place that sells mostly vegan baked goods (they offer the odd 2 with dairy cheese and/or butter). 
Most pastries are sweet, when I visited they offered one savory Handpizza with Just cheese & olives (42 kronas). You can also find a small selection of Snacks, milks & joghurts. The croissants were great! Also a good stop to buy some snacks before a train journey
